Marilyn Meyers preparing dinner family four when phone rang.
mothers neighbor, Fran.
passed out? Marilyn asked.
What's going on? Marilyn asked, starting feel more frantic.
Picturing mother alone hospital with complete strangers around worse with tubes going over place Marilyn's heart sank.
Marilyn lived Atlanta with husband, successful attorney, their teen boys.
mother lived Jackson, Mississippi, same house Marilyn grew
Whats wrong? Marilyn said, trying hard conceal panic.
Fran asked stay waiting room while Marilyn went mother, resting comfortably excited agitated, according hospital staff.
Marilyn held mothers hand.
opened eyes looked directly Marilyn didn't recognize her.
Later that night, women drove house, Marilyn realized hadnt even called sister, Cathy, lived state traveled over world.
single, free spirit owned pottery business.
Every years, Cathy would save journey until money.
great fun, hardly someone could rely crisis.
Marilyn called Cathy left message.
Meanwhile, Marilyn Fran searched mothers house, frantically looking medicine bottles legal documents.
week later, Marilyn's regained speech very little long-term memory unable walk.
doctors felt would regain most physical abilities with months specialized rehabilitation.
Marilyn found document granting power attorney, unsigned.
package, prepared ready executed.
also found different bank accounts, only with both their names
Unfortunately, without powers attorney, Marilyn couldn't access mothers accounts check into rehab facility.
addition, mother bills coming that needed paid, answering machine full, Marilyn idea would finance rehab while keeping mothers home.
Unanswered questions flooded Marilyn's mind.
flew back Atlanta collapsed bed.
next husband explained that mother didn't regain mental functions soon they would need court appointed guardianship that court would supervise mothers finances from that point forward.
